title: NamedQuery
description: A server-defined graph query in config/named_queries/. The query DSL may reference server-side bindings via {$binding: <name>} placeholders and client-supplied parameters via {$param: <name>} placeholders, rendered server-side and compiled by the query compiler. Each file's name field must match its file stem.

name.description: Stable identifier clients invoke. Must match the YAML file stem.

description.description: One-sentence, introspection-facing summary of what the query returns.

bindings.description: Server-side values substituted at render time via {$binding: <name>}. Never client-supplied.

schema.description: JSON Schema the client-supplied value must satisfy at render time.

example.description: Representative value substituted for build-time compilation against the ontology. Must satisfy schema.

parameters.description: Client-supplied values substituted at render time via {$param: <name>}, validated against each parameter's JSON Schema.

query.description: Graph query DSL object. {$binding: <name>} placeholders are replaced whole-value at render time.
